title: Roles and Responsibilities of a Sales Representative
description:
The "Roles and Responsibilities of a Sales Representative" course is designed to help an entry-level sales professional gain a firm understanding of the primary expectations from their role  and the skillsets required to meet those expectations effectively. Practical tips, expert interviews and hands-on assessments and suitable assignments make this course interesting, engaging and useful for a beginner in the world of sales. By the end of this course, the learner will be able to:

— Describe the structure of a sales department in an organization
— List the roles and responsibilities of a sales rep 
— Enumerate the role of a sales rep in qualifying new business and retaining existing business. 
— Visualize a day in the life of a sales rep 
— Map basic sales rep action items to the CRM "school students and professionals with an interest in programming.
duration: 4 weeks of study, 4 hours per week.
